item.name: Torgal Whistle
item.description: This horn-carved instrument emits a steadfast tone that calls the trusty Torgal to your side.

mount.name: Torgal
mount.action: Summon forth Torgal, a trusty hound inspired by the trusty hound inspired by the memories of the actual trusty hound.
mount.description: According to the wandering minstrel, the beast who appeared to aid the stranded Clive was a guiding spirit born of its master's memory. So impressed was the ever-insightful musician by the creature, he decided to create this faithful facsimile in hopes that it might also serve as your loyal companion.
mount.tooltip:
A more dependable comrade one
would be hard-pressed to find.
- Alphinaud
